priority_scoring_path: claude-llm: visual flash only, no functional block, no data loss or auth failure, pure UX/cosmetic degradation, 100% repro but low severity impact
severity_justification: The bug is a visual flash (~300ms) with no data loss, no blocked functionality, and a workaround exists (users can continue normally after the flash). While it affects all iOS users on every cold start and is 100% reproducible, it is purely a UX/cosmetic degradation — users are not locked out, payments are unaffected, and no core value proposition is broken. The closest historical match FLIPPI-2935 was rated P1, but that bug involved the login screen flashing *twice*, suggesting a more severe auth loop; this report's description is scoped to a single flash caused by a navigation timing issue.
owner_reason: Amareshwar Walia is the assignee of FLIPPI-2935, the near-duplicate iOS cold-start navigation/auth-timing bug, and has a consistent track record owning iOS-specific React Native and auth-flow issues (FLIPPI-1232, FLIPPI-1234, FLIPPI-1198, FLIPPI-2396).
